ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear, text-based PDF with all fields legible. ICC-issued certificate with West Sweden Chamber of Commerce stamp.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear, text-based PDF. All fields legible. Elmo Sweden AB branding with complete company details in footer.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate contains references '2192302318 / 3192302754' in the Remarks field and certificate number 'SEG-23D-800159', none of which constitute an LC reference with a bank-terms context.

occurrences_in_invoice.context: POSTADRESS/POSTAL ADRESS: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN
elmo® logo branding at the top of the invoice

consignor_search_results.conclusion: Consignor name 'Elmo Sweden AB' found explicitly in invoice footer postal address block and as branding in header.

criteria_met: Consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' identified in invoice footer and header branding (criterion 2).
Consignee 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice' identified in invoice Payer and Ship-to fields (criterion 3).
pairing_validation.reasoning: At least two of three pairing criteria are met: consignor is identified in the invoice and consignee is identified in the invoice. Pairing is valid.

candidates.source: Certificate, Box 1 (implied from address context and certificate header 'SWEDEN')

candidates.normalized_text: boretius objekt nähservice für dekorationen gmbh

candidates.normalized_text: boretius objekt nähservice für dekorationen gmbh

candidates.normalized_text: upholstery leather, swedish origin, 1 pkg, weight 4 kgs

candidates.source: Invoice, supplementary goods description block (Eori no SE5568215874)

consignor.invoice_value: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN (footer postal address)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Elmo Sweden AB' anywhere in invoice documents
comparison_steps.details: The name 'Elmo Sweden AB' is found explicitly in the invoice footer POSTADRESS/POSTAL ADRESS block: 'Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN'. The invoice is issued by Elmo Sweden AB (visible in branding 'elmo®' at top and full company details in footer). Country Sweden is confirmed by explicit text 'SWEDEN' in the footer and VAT.NO prefix 'SE' in SE556821587401.

rules_applied.description: Group structure / explicit occurrence of consignor name in invoice
rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - Consignor name 'Elmo Sweden AB' found explicitly in invoice footer postal address block
Country Sweden verified via explicit 'SWEDEN' text in footer and VAT prefix 'SE'

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Elmo Sweden AB, Kyrkogatan 18, 51250, Svenljunga'. Applying rule 4.1.0 first: searched for 'Elmo Sweden AB' across all invoice text. Found exact match in invoice footer block: 'Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN'. Also found 'elmo' branding in header. The invoice is clearly issued by Elmo Sweden AB. Country verified: 'SWEDEN' appears explicitly in the footer, and VAT number prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden per rule 4.1.2.1. Address differs (Kyrkogatan 18 vs SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA) but per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH — only name and country matter. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Address mismatch between certificate (Kyrkogatan 18, 51250 Svenljunga) and invoice footer (SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA) could indicate different entity
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.5, differences in street address or postal code shall NOT cause MISMATCH. The company name and country match. The address difference is likely a format variation (full address vs postal address format) for the same location in Svenljunga.

consignee.certificate_value: Boretius Objekt Nähservice, Südring 4, 76473 Iffezheim, Germany
consignee.invoice_value: Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH, Südring 4, DE 76473 - Iffezheim, Germany (Payer field)

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice. Invoice has 'Payer' field with 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH'.
comparison_steps.details: The Payer field is the primary billing/factoring field. This is the authoritative consignee per rule 4.2.0.2 priority 1.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice' with invoice Payer name 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH'
comparison_steps.result: Name difference detected - certificate name is a subset of invoice name
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice'. Invoice: 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH'. The certificate name is missing 'für Dekorationen GmbH'. 'GmbH' is a legal form word. 'für Dekorationen' is a business activity/purpose descriptor meaning 'for Decorations'.

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.3.7 - Missing business-type/legal-form words in certificate - MANUAL_REVIEW check
comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate name is exact subset of invoice name with only business-type or legal-form words missing
comparison_steps.details: All words in certificate name ('Boretius', 'Objekt', 'Nähservice') appear in invoice name in same order. The missing words are 'für Dekorationen' (business activity descriptor - 2 words) and 'GmbH' (legal form). 'GmbH' is handled by 4.1.3.6. For 'für Dekorationen', these are business-type/activity words.

comparison_steps.description: Check if difference consists only of generic organization/activity words
comparison_steps.details: 'für Dekorationen' translates to 'for Decorations' — this is a business activity/purpose description. Combined with 'GmbH' (legal form per 4.1.3.6), the missing words are: one legal form word and two business activity words. Rule 4.1.3.7 applies for the business-type words.

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.3.7 - Certificate name as exact subset with missing business-type words
comparison_steps.description: Certificate name 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice' is an exact subset of invoice name. Missing words: 'für Dekorationen' (2 words, business activity) and 'GmbH' (legal form).
comparison_steps.result: Conditions met for MANUAL_REVIEW but 4.1.3.6 handles GmbH separately
comparison_steps.details: All words in certificate ('Boretius', 'Objekt', 'Nähservice') appear in invoice name in same order. The missing 'GmbH' is a legal form abbreviation (4.1.3.6 → allowed). The missing 'für Dekorationen' are 2 words describing business activity/type. Per 4.1.3.7: certificate name is exact subset, missing words ≤ 2, they are business-type descriptors, land matches (Germany), no other similar party in invoice. However, rule 4.1.3.7 gives MANUAL_REVIEW not MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate consignee field shows signs of layout truncation
comparison_steps.details: Certificate Box 2 contains: 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice / Südring 4 / 76473 Iffezheim / Germany'. The company name 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice' ends where 'für Dekorationen GmbH' would continue but the address starts on the next line. This is consistent with field length limitation in the certificate. The full name 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH' explicitly appears in the invoice. Certificate text is an exact prefix of the invoice name. All conditions of 4.2.2.1.1/4.1.3.2 are met: (1) exact prefix, (2) truncation appears layout-driven, (3) no other similar party, (4) land matches Germany. Result: MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country: Germany. Invoice Payer country: Germany.

rules_applied.description: Priority ordering for consignee identification - Payer field used as primary billing field
rules_applied.outcome: Payer field identified as authoritative consignee source

rules_applied.description: Layout truncation in certificate - certificate name is exact prefix of invoice full name
rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - Certificate text 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice' is an exact initial part of invoice 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH', truncation is layout-driven, no other similar party, country matches
GmbH is a legal form word, its omission in certificate is acceptable

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice, Südring 4, 76473 Iffezheim, Germany'. Invoice Payer (primary billing field per 4.2.0.2): 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH, Südring 4, DE 76473 - Iffezheim, Germany'. The certificate name 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice' is an exact initial part (prefix) of the invoice name 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH'. The missing portion 'für Dekorationen GmbH' appears to be omitted due to field space limitation in the certificate (layout truncation). Per rule 4.2.2.1.1 (layout truncation in certificate), all conditions are satisfied: (1) certificate text is exact prefix of invoice name, (2) truncation appears layout-driven given the certificate field format, (3) no other party with similar name structure, (4) country Germany matches. Address also matches: Südring 4, 76473 Iffezheim. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The missing 'für Dekorationen GmbH' constitutes a different legal entity
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.2.2.1.1 (layout truncation), certificate text is an exact prefix of the invoice name. The certificate's Box 2 has limited space and the name appears truncated. All other details (address, postal code, city, country) match exactly. No other entity with similar name exists in the invoice. Layout truncation is the most plausible explanation.

goods_description.invoice_value: ELMOSOFT 97038 I (Description column) + Upholstery Leather (supplementary block)

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are present in certificate
comparison_steps.result: No explicit separate article number field in certificate. The text 'Elmosoft 97038 I' appears to be a product code/name combination.
comparison_steps.details: The certificate contains '1' as item number and 'Elmosoft 97038 I' as the product description. '97038 I' could be an article/color code. The invoice has Product code '2100104202' and description 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I'. The certificate does not list a separate article number matching '2100104202'. However, the product designation '97038 I' is embedded in the description and matches between documents.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation and compare
comparison_steps.details: Certificate main designation: 'Elmosoft 97038 I'. Invoice description: 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I'. After case normalization: 'elmosoft 97038 i' = 'elmosoft 97038 i'. Exact match. Additionally, 'Upholstery Leather' in certificate matches 'Upholstery Leather' in invoice supplementary block.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation
rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - 'Elmosoft 97038 I' exactly matches 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I' after case normalization

rules_applied.description: Non-identity-bearing additions do not cause MISMATCH
rules_applied.outcome: Invoice contains additional product code '2100104202' and commodity code '41071291' which are non-identity-bearing additions

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: 'Elmosoft 97038 I / Upholstery Leather'. Invoice goods description: 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I' (in Description column) and 'Upholstery Leather' (in supplementary block). The identity-bearing main designation 'Elmosoft 97038 I' is an exact match after case normalization (4.3.3). 'Upholstery Leather' also matches exactly. Additional codes in invoice (product code 2100104202, commodity code 41071291, HS tarif no 4107 1291) are non-identity-bearing additions per rule 4.3.4. Result: MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate Box 7 states '4 Kgs'. Numeric value: 4. Unit: Kgs (kilograms).
comparison_steps.result: Valid quantity specification with numeric value and unit
comparison_steps.details: Both numeric value (4) and unit (Kgs) are explicitly stated.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states '4 Kgs' without explicit GW/NW category.
comparison_steps.result: Single weight value without category - apply rule 4.4.2.2 point 2
comparison_steps.details: Certificate has one single weight value '4 Kgs' without GW/NW specification. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: if certificate has ONE weight value without category, and this value can be identified in the invoice, and the invoice does NOT contain a conflicting alternative weight value of another category → MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value '4' with unit 'kgs' in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice supplementary block states 'Weight 4 kgs'. Numeric value 4 matches. Unit 'kgs' matches. No other conflicting weight value of a different category exists in the invoice.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check - numeric value identified in invoice
rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - Value '4' with unit 'kgs' found in invoice

rules_applied.description: Single weight value without GW/NW category
rules_applied.outcome: Point 2 applied: single value, identified in invoice, no conflicting alternative weight → MATCH

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate quantity in Box 7: '4 Kgs'. Invoice states 'Weight 4 kgs' in the supplementary goods description block. Numeric value matches exactly (4 = 4). Unit matches (Kgs = kgs after case normalization). No GW/NW category specified in certificate — per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, since the certificate has a single weight value, the value can be identified in the invoice, and the invoice does not contain a conflicting alternative weight of another category, the result is MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Absence of GW/NW designation should trigger MANUAL_REVIEW
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.4.2.2 point 2 explicitly allows MATCH when: (a) only one weight value is stated in certificate, (b) the value is found in the invoice, (c) no conflicting alternative weight category exists in the invoice. All three conditions are met here.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin indication in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Found 'Swedish Origin' in invoice supplementary block
comparison_steps.details: Invoice supplementary goods description block explicitly states 'Swedish Origin'. This is an explicit origin designation.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EUROPEAN UNION' and 'Swedish Origin'. Sweden is an EU member state. Check if invoice confirms.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate origin: 'EUROPEAN UNION' + 'Swedish Origin' (= EU Sweden). Invoice states 'Swedish Origin'. Per rule 4.5.4.2: if certificate states EU and a specific EU member state, and invoice states that specific member state → verified. Sweden is EU member (EU-27). Additionally, per rule 4.5.4.2.1: certificate states 'EU Sweden', invoice confirms 'Swedish Origin'. The EU part is subsumptive — Sweden is an EU member state, so stating Swedish Origin in the invoice inherently confirms EU origin as well.

rules_applied.description: EU member state normalization - certificate states EU + Sweden, invoice states Swedish Origin
rules_applied.outcome: MATCH - Sweden is an EU member state, invoice confirms Swedish origin
Certificate states EU + Sweden, invoice confirms Sweden specifically → MATCH

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 states: 'EUROPEAN UNION / Swedish Origin'. This indicates origin is European Union, specifically Sweden. Invoice supplementary block states: 'Swedish Origin'. Per rule 4.5.4.2, if certificate states an EU member state and the invoice confirms that member state (or vice versa with EU), this is verified. Sweden is an EU-27 member. The invoice explicitly confirms 'Swedish Origin' which matches the certificate's 'Swedish Origin'. The 'EUROPEAN UNION' designation in the certificate is a superset that includes Sweden — the invoice's confirmation of Swedish origin inherently confirms EU origin. No conflicting origin information exists in the invoice. Result: MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Not applicable - no LC reference found in certificate
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate references '2192302318 / 3192302754' are delivery/order references, not LC numbers. Certificate number 'SEG-23D-800159' is a certificate identifier. No bank-terms context found.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: PASSED - Consignor and consignee both identified in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.details: Criterion 2: Consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' found in invoice footer. Criterion 3: Consignee 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice' found in invoice Payer field.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignor group structure - explicit occurrence in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - 'Elmo Sweden AB' found in invoice footer postal address
rule_evaluation_log.details: Name found explicitly. Country Sweden confirmed via footer text and VAT prefix SE.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Country verification via indirect identifiers (VAT prefix)
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Applied - SE prefix in VAT number SE556821587401 confirms Sweden
rule_evaluation_log.details: Additional confirmation via explicit 'SWEDEN' text in footer.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority ordering - Payer field as primary billing field
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Applied - Payer field used as authoritative consignee source
rule_evaluation_log.details: Invoice has explicit 'Payer' field with named party.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Juridical party name comparison for consignee
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Difference detected - certificate has partial name, invoice has full name with additional words
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate: 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice', Invoice: 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH'

rule_evaluation_log.description: Layout truncation in certificate for consignee name
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - Certificate text is exact prefix of invoice full name, truncation is layout-driven
rule_evaluation_log.details: All conditions met: (1) exact prefix, (2) layout-driven (certificate box has limited space, name breaks before 'für Dekorationen GmbH' and address starts on next line), (3) no other similar party, (4) country matches Germany.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: GmbH recognized as legal form, its omission in certificate acceptable
rule_evaluation_log.details: Supportive rule for the layout truncation assessment.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - Germany in certificate matches Germany in invoice

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - 'Elmosoft 97038 I' matches after case normalization
rule_evaluation_log.details: Identity-bearing main designation 'Elmosoft 97038 I' found exactly in invoice description column as 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I'. 'Upholstery Leather' also matches.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - Value '4 kgs' found in invoice

rule_evaluation_log.description: Weight category check - single value without GW/NW
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Point 2 applied: single value, identified in invoice, no conflicting alternative → MATCH
rule_evaluation_log.details: Only one weight value in certificate. Invoice confirms same value. No GW/NW conflict.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - Certificate EU + Sweden, Invoice confirms Swedish Origin
rule_evaluation_log.details: Sweden is EU-27 member. Invoice 'Swedish Origin' confirms both Sweden and EU origin.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Elmo Sweden AB kan identifieras i fakturan, mottagaren Boretius Objekt Nähservice kan verifieras i fakturans betalare-fält (med avkortning av det längre bolagsnamnet), varubeskrivningen Elmosoft 97038 I / Upholstery Leather matchar exakt, vikten 4 kgs överensstämmer, och ursprungslandet Europeiska Unionen/Sverige bekräftas av fakturans uppgift 'Swedish Origin'. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

consistency_check.confidence_floor_check: All applicable checkpoints have confidence >= 0.85. Lowest: consignee at 0.92.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair_summary: Certifikat SEG-23D-800159 utfärdat 2023-03-23 av West Sweden Chamber of Commerce jämfört med faktura 2023032257 daterad 23-03-2023 från Elmo Sweden AB.

sections.invoice_value: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN (fakturans footer/postal adress)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur/explicit förekomst (4.1.0) — avsändarens namn 'Elmo Sweden AB' återfinns uttryckligen i fakturans adressblock. Land Sweden verifierat via explicit text och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' identifieras exakt i fakturans fotblock (POSTADRESS: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN). Fakturan är utställd av Elmo Sweden AB med branding 'elmo®' i sidhuvudet. Land Sverige bekräftas av explicit 'SWEDEN' i adressen samt VAT-nummer med SE-prefix. Adressskillnad (Kyrkogatan 18 vs SE-512 81 Svenljunga) påverkar inte bedömningen per regel 4.1.5.

sections.certificate_value: Boretius Objekt Nähservice, Südring 4, 76473 Iffezheim, Germany
sections.invoice_value: Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH, Südring 4, DE 76473 - Iffezheim, Germany (Payer-fält)
sections.rule_applied: Layoutavkortning i certifikatet (4.2.2.1.1) — certifikatets namn utgör en exakt inledande del av fakturans fullständiga bolagsnamn. Avkortningen beror på fältbegränsning i certifikatet.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice' är en exakt prefix av fakturans Payer 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH'. Det saknade 'für Dekorationen GmbH' bedöms vara avkortat på grund av fältbegränsning i certifikatets Box 2. Adress (Südring 4, 76473 Iffezheim) och land (Germany) matchar exakt. Ingen annan part med liknande namnstruktur förekommer i fakturan.

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) — identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Elmosoft 97038 I' matchar exakt efter normalisering av versaler/gemener.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'Elmosoft 97038 I / Upholstery Leather' identifieras exakt i fakturan. 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I' i beskrivningskolumnen matchar efter normalisering av versaler. 'Upholstery Leather' återfinns i fakturans tilläggsblock. Ytterligare koder i fakturan (produktkod, HS-nummer) är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) — numeriskt värde och enhet identifierade i fakturan. Enskilt viktvärde utan GW/NW-kategori (4.4.2.2 punkt 2).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet '4 Kgs' (Box 7) matchar exakt mot fakturans 'Weight 4 kgs'. Numeriskt värde 4 och enhet kgs överensstämmer. Ingen viktkategori (GW/NW) angiven i certifikatet — per regel 4.4.2.2 punkt 2 godkänns detta då det är det enda viktvärdet och fakturan inte innehåller motstridigt alternativt viktvärde.

sections.rule_applied: EU-medlemslandsnormalisering (4.5.4.2) — certifikat anger EU + Sverige, faktura bekräftar svenskt ursprung.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsfält anger 'EUROPEAN UNION / Swedish Origin'. Fakturan anger 'Swedish Origin' i tilläggsblocket. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat (EU-27). Per regel 4.5.4.2 är EU ↔ specifikt EU-medlemsland utbytbart. Fakturans 'Swedish Origin' bekräftar certifikatets 'Swedish Origin' direkt, och EU-anspråket bekräftas indirekt genom att Sverige är EU-medlem. Ingen motstridande ursprungsinformation i fakturan.

human_readable_report.final_conclusion: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikatet SEG-23D-800159 kan verifieras mot faktura 2023032257. Dokumentparet uppfyller kraven för automatiskt godkännande.
